spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('5 seconds', ts) AS "time",
  avg(p_kw) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Incomer') AS "Incomer",
  avg(p_kw) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'PackLine1') AS "PackLine1",
  avg(p_kw) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Utilities') AS "Utilities"
FROM energy.meter_readings_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  ts AS time,
  apfc_q_before_kvar AS "Reactive Power Before APFC",
  apfc_q_after_kvar AS "Reactive Power After APFC"
FROM energy.meter_readings_raw
WHERE
  meter_id = 'Incomer'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 seconds', ts) AS "time",
  avg(pf) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Incomer') AS "Incomer",
  avg(pf) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'PackLine1') AS "PackLine1",
  avg(pf) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Utilities') AS "Utilities"
FROM energy.meter_readings_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 seconds', ts) AS "time",
  avg(thd_i_pct) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Incomer') AS "Incomer",
  avg(thd_i_pct) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'PackLine1') AS "PackLine1",
  avg(thd_i_pct) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Utilities') AS "Utilities"
FROM energy.meter_readings_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 seconds', ts) AS "time",
  avg(q_kvar) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Incomer') AS "Incomer",
  avg(q_kvar) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'PackLine1') AS "PackLine1",
  avg(q_kvar) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Utilities') AS "Utilities"
FROM energy.meter_readings_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 seconds', ts) AS "time",
  avg(s_kva) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Incomer') AS "Incomer",
  avg(s_kva) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'PackLine1') AS "PackLine1",
  avg(s_kva) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Utilities') AS "Utilities"
FROM energy.meter_readings_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

WITH raw AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    meter_id,
    p_kw,
    EXTRACT(
      EPOCH FROM ts - LAG(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY meter_id ORDER BY ts)
    ) AS dt_s
  FROM energy.meter_readings_raw
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
),
energy_calc AS (
  SELECT
    ts,
    meter_id,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN dt_s IS NULL THEN 0
        WHEN dt_s < 0 THEN 0
        WHEN dt_s > 10 THEN 0
        ELSE p_kw * dt_s / 3600.0
      END
    ) OVER (PARTITION BY meter_id ORDER BY ts) AS kwh_calc
  FROM raw
)
SELECT
  time_bucket('5 seconds', ts) AS "time",
  avg(kwh_calc) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Incomer') AS "Incomer",
  avg(kwh_calc) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'PackLine1') AS "PackLine1",
  avg(kwh_calc) FILTER (WHERE meter_id = 'Utilities') AS "Utilities"
FROM energy_calc
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (meter_id)
  meter_id,
  round(p_kw::numeric, 2) AS p_kw,
  round(q_kvar::numeric, 2) AS q_kvar,
  round(s_kva::numeric, 2) AS s_kva,
  round(pf::numeric, 3) AS pf,
  round(thd_i_pct::numeric, 2) AS thd_i_pct,
  round(kwh::numeric, 3) AS kwh,
  round(demand_kw::numeric, 2) AS demand_kw,
  ts
FROM energy.meter_readings_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY meter_id, ts DESC;

spec.title: APFC Closed Loop Power Factor Correction

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  ts AS time,
  apfc_pf_before AS "PF Before APFC",
  apfc_pf_after AS "PF After APFC"
FROM energy.meter_readings_raw
WHERE
  meter_id = 'Incomer'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts;

SELECT
  ts AS time,
  apfc_q_cap_kvar AS "Injected Capacitor kVAR",
  apfc_steps_active AS "Active Capacitor Steps"
FROM energy.meter_readings_raw
WHERE
  meter_id = 'Incomer'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts;
